MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Appearances:
William Stephen Wilson, Esq. for Plaintiff Tobin & Tobin a Professional Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant James R. Schuler.
Damages of $91,657.00
Costs of $519.00
Interest of $12,179.00.
For the total of $104,355.00
Judgment signed in open court.
